pipeline_status.analyst: EXP-192 (WIN-012 rewrite) and EXP-193 (SEC-5.0 framing) pending. EXP-194 (WIN-053 return-channel preemption) and EXP-195 (SEC-8b.3 dual-baseline + discriminating tests) created this run.
pipeline_status.curmudgeon: 4 pending reviews processed: WIN-053.c4 (7 holes), WIN-062.c4 (8 holes), SEC-8b.3.c2 (8 holes), EXP-190-proposal (9 holes). All 4 added to processed-reviews ledger.

external_changes.dome_site_changes: Not checked this run (poller runs on separate schedule).

details.change: Removed boilerplate monitor.py "hardcoded/live-fetch" paragraph — WIN-053 has no monitoring; replaced with correct post-hoc argument (trivial-transcription, no timestamping test applies).
168 → 195 Gauss coefficients for IGRF-13 (degree 13 = 195, not degree 12 = 168).
North pole field strength: ~58,000–60,000 nT → ~54,000–56,000 nT per WMM2025/IGRF-13.

Source attribution: "published by Tesla in 1905 (US Patent 787412) and restated in his Colorado Springs Notes" → attributed correctly to 1899 experiments, posthumously published 1978; 1905 patent noted for spherical-Earth drawings only.
"adopts this published number verbatim" → "adopts this published value and re-expresses it as 1.574c using the dome disc diameter" — removes false "verbatim" claim.
"century-old patent value" → "century-old published velocity" — consistent with H1 source fix.
"the Fail-clause cannot be triggered" → "triggering the Fail-clause would require abandoning" — softens from absolute to conditional per EXP-191 concession.
"registered 2026-04-04" → "dome registration 2026-03-12 via Git + OpenTimestamps; our tracker entry 2026-04-04" — distinguishes dome date from our tracker date.
